title: Verdict-Map Evidence Array Shape
description: Schema for the evidence array entries in the per-wave verdict map. Carries the trivial-token denylist, minimum length threshold, and citation markers used by the evidence-array gate. This gate is form-only verification — substance check deferred to a future milestone. The top-level x-* extension fields are the load-bearing SSO for gate consumers — hooks source them via jq rather than re-parsing nested definitions, mirroring the x-disallowed-fields convention in manifest-schema.json.

evidence.description: Per-assertion evidence strings. Each entry must be non-trivial: either longer than x-min-evidence-length or containing at least one x-evidence-citation-marker substring.

items.description: A single evidence item. Non-trivial when it exceeds the minimum length threshold or contains a citation marker (path separator, backtick quote, angle bracket, etc.).
